description: Synthetic and mesh upper Has a padded mesh inner and tongue with tongue lock technology Lock-Fit technology at the mouth region Has advanced Resalyte technology Has mechanical spring cushion which transforms the energy of impact into propulsion for your stride Engineered to mimic a natural gait with a strike zone in the midfoot rather than the heel Thick rubber outsole with arrow shaped lugs and curved bottom to shift the point of impact forward to create mid-foot strike and promote natural motion
